data.category_pricing_pattern: Of 7 competitor(s) analyzed: 2 subscription, 5 unknown (pricing page not fetched).
churn_signals: refund policy, so since I was within the 14 day window, I followed their steps to request a refund.
refund the overpayment or save the overpayment as a credit.
RefundCat is a SaaS to helping iOS developers and vendors save more their revenue from unreasonable refund requests.
refund the MONEY for all deleted reviews.
cancelled they didn't even bother to respond.
auto_flags: High churn language in reviews (5 signals) — category has a retention problem. Build in churn-prevention features from day one.
B2C framing + churn signals: consumer WTP is especially fragile. Freemium + upgrade path must be extremely clear.
